visual: Steps backward repeatedly while one hand retracts past the ear and pushes forward as the other withdraws to the hip, body rotating with each step.
motion_description: The continuous, slow-paced motion begins with the practitioner sweeping one arm backward while leaving the other extended, rotating the torso to the side and lifting the front leg to step backward. As weight smoothly shifts onto the rear foot, the back hand arcs up past the ear to press forward at shoulder height, while the extended arm withdraws to the hip and the torso turns back to the center. This flowing sequence is then repeated symmetrically, stepping backward with the other leg while alternating the pressing and withdrawing arms.
